evals.prompt: Produce the final client report for the European EV market entry engagement
evals.expected_output: An executive-grade .docx report with all required sections
expectations: Title page with client name, engagement title, date, and confidentiality notice
Executive summary that fits in half a page
Body sections organized by storyline headlines
Counter-argument section addressing pre-mortem failure modes
Research Notes section with numbered source entries
No banned language (leverage, synergies, holistic, etc.)
